response:
If you want **cheaper alternatives to Aha!**, the best value options in the results are **Trello, Jira, ClickUp, Asana, and Monday dev** for general product/project work, plus **Canny, FeedBear, and Frill** if your main need is feedback or idea management rather than full Aha!-style roadmapping.[1][2][3][5]

A quick price-focused shortlist:

| Tool | Starting price in results | Best fit |
|---|---:|---|
| Trello | $5/user/month | Simple visual task tracking[1][4] |
| GitHub | $4/user/month | Development teams already working in code[1] |
| Jira | $7.91–$8.60/user/month | Software teams managing complex workflows[1][4] |
| ClickUp | $7/user/month | All-in-one productivity and customizable workflows[1] |
| Monday dev | $9/seat/month | Customizable product development platform[1] |
| Asana | $10.99/user/month | Task-based team coordination[1][4] |
| Canny | Starts at $19/month | Feedback boards and voting[5] |
| Frill | Starts at $25/month | Small teams wanting unlimited teammates[5] |
| Productboard | $19/maker/month | Feedback-led prioritization and roadmaps[1] |
| FeedBear | $49/month | Cheaper Aha! Ideas-style feedback management[3] |

For teams that want the **closest cheaper replacement for Aha! Ideas**, **FeedBear** is explicitly described as significantly cheaper, with pricing of **$49/month** for up to 3 team members or **$99/month** for unlimited team members, while Aha! Ideas starts at **$117/month** annually and can cost much more depending on seats.[3]

For teams that want **broader product management features** at lower cost, the results suggest **Savio, Productboard, Monday.com, ProductPlan, ProdPad, UserVoice, and Roadmunk** as top Aha! competitors, with Savio specifically presented as saving a 5-PM team at least **$1,900 per year** versus Aha! in one comparison.[2]

If you want, I can narrow this to:
- **cheapest feedback tool**
- **cheapest roadmap tool**
- **best all-in-one Aha! replacement under $20/user**
- **best free alternative**
